message: Node started: Given the entropy function S(x, T) derived by the previous agent, formulate the mathematical constraint for an adiabatic process where dS = 0. Use this constraint to express the temperature T as a function of the extension x. Then, use the thermodynamic relation for force F = -(dF/dx)_S or F = T(dS/dx)_T to derive the final force law F(x) under the condition of constant entropy.
